provenance.source_corpus: Vegetation Control Treatments to Favor Naturally Regenerated Betula alleghaniensis Saplings Following Seed‐Tree Cut: Sapling Monitoring Two Years after Treatment

source_spans.text: Four contrasting vegetation control treatments were tested
Mean diameter increment significantly increased with increasing vegetation control
Mean etiolation index decreased significantly with increasing vegetation control
increasing the severity of vegetation removal also made saplings more conspicuous to herbivores, which increased browsing
significantly lower sapling survival in the TS compared to the TC treatment
